query: UPDATE videos SET status = 'failed', errorMessage = 'Pipeline stuck - expired by admin' WHERE status IN ('generating_voiceover', 'generating_visuals', 'composing', 'uploading') AND createdAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE);
